headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Southern, Raises Price Target to $99
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Southern (NYSE:SO) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $88 to $99.

headline: The 'Mag 7' Just Became The 'Lag 7': Analyst
summary: Craig Johnson sees a "bullish market with a lowercase b." Learn why Piper Sandler predicts a modest 5% upside and a rotation out of big tech.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Southern (SO) After Strong Five Year Share Price Gains?
summary: Wondering if Southern's share price around US$97.59 still offers value or if most of the upside is already reflected? This article breaks down what the current valuation really implies for you. Southern has delivered returns of 0.1% over the last 7 days, 1.4% over 30 days, 11.9% year to date, 13.4% over 1 year, 49.8% over 3 years, and 82.3% over 5 years. This puts recent moves into a longer term context as you think about risk and opportunity. Recent coverage around Southern has focused on...
